Auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
Auth.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
Auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
Auth.resetLinkSent: If that email is registered, you'll receive a reset link shortly.
Auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Enter and confirm your new password.
Auth.invalidOrExpiredToken: This link has expired or is invalid.
Auth.forgotPasswordFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Common.smtpNotConfigured: E-mail is not configured. Check SMTP configuration.

Dashboard.title: Welcome to Pay Tracker
Dashboard.subtitle: Manage your household bills in one place.
Dashboard.paymentsDesc: View and mark this month's bills as paid
Dashboard.manageBillsDesc: Create, edit, and track your recurring bills
Dashboard.archivedBillsDesc: View past bills and payment history

BillsPage.title: Your Bills
BillsPage.subtitle: Manage your recurring and one-off bills. Each bill generates payment reminders automatically.

ArchivedBillsPage.title: Archived Bills
ArchivedBillsPage.subtitle: Payment history is preserved for all archived bills.
ArchivedBillsPage.willAppearHere: Bills you archive will appear here

RestoreDeletedDialog.title: Restore deleted payments?
RestoreDeletedDialog.description: Some future payments for “{name}” were previously deleted. Restore them with the updated template values?

ArchiveConfirmDialog.title: Archive “{billName}”?
ArchiveConfirmDialog.description: This bill will be hidden from the active list. Payment history is preserved and accessible from the archived view.

DayPicker.heading: Day of month
DayPicker.shortMonthWarning: Some months have fewer days — the bill will fall on the last available day.

PaymentsPage.title: Payments
PaymentsPage.subtitle: Track and mark your bills month by month.

DeletePaymentDialog.title: Delete this payment?
DeletePaymentDialog.descriptionRecurring: This payment entry will be removed. The recurring bill will continue generating future entries.
DeletePaymentDialog.descriptionOneOff: This one-off payment entry will be removed. This cannot be undone.
DeletePaymentDialog.deleteFutureLabel: Also delete all future unpaid entries for this bill

RestoreButton.dialogDescription: This will permanently replace all your current data with the contents of “{filename}”. This action cannot be undone.
RestoreButton.error: Restore failed. Please check the file and try again.
RestoreButton.fileTooLarge: File too large. Backup files must be under 10 MB.
RestoreButton.invalidFile: This file doesn't look like a valid backup.
RestoreButton.staleDataWarning: This backup has fewer bills and payments than your current data. Restoring will permanently delete the difference.

BackupButton.dialogDescription: This will download a complete copy of all Pay Tracker data — bill templates, payment history, and user accounts. Store the file securely.

SettingsPage.unsavedDescription: You have unsaved changes. Leave without saving?

profile.title: User Profile
profile.description: Update your login email and password.
profile.emailHint: Enter a new address, then confirm with your current password.
profile.passwordHint: Enter your current password, then choose a new one.
profile.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
profile.emailAndPasswordRequired: Please enter both a new email address and your current password.

emailNotifications.title: Email Notifications
emailNotifications.description: Choose when to receive email reminders for upcoming and overdue bills.
emailNotifications.noneWarning: Select at least one option to receive email reminders.
emailNotifications.sendMonthlySummaryNoData: No payments found for this month
emailNotifications.serverTimeHint: Reminders are sent based on server time (UTC). Current server time: {time}.

browserNotifications.title: Browser Notifications
browserNotifications.description: Get notified when a bill is due today.
browserNotifications.osHint: Not seeing notifications? Check your OS notification settings (macOS: System Settings → Notifications).
browserNotifications.blockedWarning: Browser notifications are blocked. Enable them in your browser or operating system settings.

backup.title: Backup Data
backup.description: Download a complete copy of all your Pay Tracker data as a JSON file.

restore.title: Restore Data
restore.description: Replace all current data with a previously downloaded backup file.
